accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.empty_desc: Open Dofus Retro and log in to your characters
messages.title: Private Messages
messages.empty_desc: Incoming private messages will appear here
settings.title: Settings
settings.group_invite_desc: Focus on invite from your own accounts
settings.trade_desc: Focus on trade request from your own accounts
settings.taskbar_ungroup_desc: Separates each character with a custom icon
settings.experimental_warning: The following options are experimental. Use at your own risk.
settings.auto_accept_desc: Press Enter after focusing on invite/trade
settings.show_debug_desc: Show the Debug tab with notification traces
hotkeys.title: Hotkeys
hotkeys.label: Hotkeys:
language.title: Language
setup.title: Permissions required
setup.subtitle: Focus Retro needs the following permissions before it can work
setup.accessibility_why: Required to observe game notifications and control window focus via AXObserver.
setup.accessibility_note: Must be granted manually in System Settings — Focus Retro cannot request it automatically.
setup.screen_recording_why: Required to read window titles to detect which Dofus Retro characters are running.
setup.input_monitoring_why: Required to detect global keyboard shortcuts. Without it, hotkeys won't work.
update.consent_body: FocusRetro can check for updates at startup via GitHub Releases. No other data is sent.
settings.update_check_desc: Contacts GitHub Releases at startup to detect new versions.
close.title: Before you go...
close.body: How should FocusRetro behave when you click the close button?
close.note: You can change this later in Settings
